# Plan - 2026-06-07

Source: [.github/research/2026-06-07-research.md](2026-06-07-research.md)

## Context

The 06-07 research cycle confirmed that 06-06 #5 (deny-rule glob warnings)
shipped via PR #718 and that the planning agent already filed 5 of the
06-06 backlog items plus the new Item #2 (slash disambiguation) overnight:

| #   | Issue                                                            |
| --- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 723 | [hook] Stop hook additionalContext (06-06 #6)                    |
| 725 | [permission] Shell-startup + build-tool config protection (#1)   |
| 726 | [provider] Multi-model fallbackModel chain (#2)                  |
| 727 | [plugin] examples/plugins/ env-blocker + tool-logger (#4)        |
| 728 | [tool] Typed TimeoutError + AbortError (#3)                      |
| 729 | [command] :skill / :mcp slash-command source disambiguation      |

That leaves four research items unfiled. All four map to verified-real
source paths (no invented file paths) and none duplicate an open
auto-implement issue or a recent closed one (verified via
`gh issue list --state closed --search ...`).

## Items selected this cycle (4 of cap 5)

Sized by Value/Effort. Quick-win first (regression-guard audit), then
the three remaining 06-06 items in original priority order.

| # | Title                                                                | Cat       | Size          | Cycle |
| - | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ------------- | ----- |
| 1 | [tool] TUI question-prompt rendering audit + Ink regression test     | tool      | small (~2h)   | NEW   |
| 2 | [skill] Plugin-bundled skills auto-registration                      | skill     | small/med (~5h) | 2nd |
| 3 | [command] alexi plugin uninstall / list subcommands                  | command   | small (~3h)   | 2nd   |
| 4 | [core] Stale-session recovery with `session not found: <id>` error   | core      | small (~3h)   | 2nd   |

I am intentionally NOT fabricating a fifth issue. Cap is 5; research
surfaces 4 actionable gaps. Filing a fifth would violate the
"every issue must cite a research source" rule.

## Why this set

1. **Item 1 (TUI question-prompt audit)** is the cycle's only fresh item.
   Cline #11293 fixed the same Yoga-layout failure mode in v3.88.1; we
   use Ink (Yoga under the hood). Defensive audit on
   `src/tool/tools/question.ts` -> `src/cli/tui/components/ToolCallBlock.tsx`
   -> `src/cli/tui/components/MessageBubble.tsx`, plus a regression test
   under `tests/cli/tui/` (the actual TUI test convention; the research
   file's `src/cli/tui/__tests__/` was speculative).
2. **Item 2 (plugin-bundled skills)** is now in its 2nd cycle. The
   plumbing already exists in `src/plugin/index.ts` lines 1080-1081 and
   1399-1400 (`if (plugin.skills) ... for (const skillDef of plugin.skills)`);
   the gap is making the discovery & registration flow user-visible and
   tested. Closes a known surface gap before more reference plugins land.
3. **Item 3 (`alexi plugin uninstall` / `list`)** complements
   `src/cli/commands/plugin.ts`, which today exposes only `init` (verified
   at `src/cli/commands/plugin.ts:131-146`). 2nd cycle. Without an
   uninstall path, Item #4 from issue #727 (reference plugins) creates
   onboarding friction.
4. **Item 4 (stale-session recovery)** is the twice-precedented item
   (cline #11259 + #11325). Today
   `src/core/sessionManager.ts:106-123` returns `null` silently when the
   session file is missing; sessions referenced from `~/.alexi/sessions/`
   index but absent on disk give the user a confusing fail. Adopt
   cline's error string `session not found: <id>` for grep-able logs.

## Why other research items deferred

- **06-06 backlog #1, #2, #3, #4, #6, NEW #2**: already filed (issues
  723, 725, 726, 727, 728, 729). Implementation is the engineering
  agent's job.
- **claude-code v2.1.167-v2.1.168**: research explicitly flags "no
  actionable surface". Re-evaluate next cycle.
- **cline #11333 (vscode packaging)**: not applicable (we ship a CLI,
  not a vscode extension).
- **continuedev / aider**: no functional commits this window; rotation
  candidate flagged for next cycle.

## Throughput note for management vertical

Planning-agent throughput jumped sharply this cycle: 5 of 9 06-06
backlog items plus 1 new were filed overnight (issues 723-729),
matching the research's 22% combined close+file rate observation.
The 06-07 cycle's 4 remaining items are all 2nd cycle or fresh; no
3rd-cycle-or-older items remain unfiled after this plan ships. That is
the first time in three weeks the planning queue has fully drained the
prior-cycle backlog.
